memberdef.argsstring: (QOCOCscMatrix *P, QOCOCscMatrix *A, QOCOCscMatrix *G, QOCOCscMatrix *At, QOCOCscMatrix *Gt, QOCOFloat static_reg, QOCOInt n, QOCOInt m, QOCOInt p, QOCOInt l, QOCOInt nsoc, QOCOInt *q, QOCOInt *PregtoKKT, QOCOInt *AttoKKT, QOCOInt *GttoKKT, QOCOInt *nt2kkt, QOCOInt *ntdiag2kkt, QOCOInt Wnnz)
memberdef.name: construct_kkt

briefdescription.para: Constructs and returns the upper triangular portion of the KKT matrix in CSC form.

detaileddescription.para: [ P + e*I A^T G^T ] K = | A - e * I 0 | [ G 0 -I ]

parameterdescription.para: Mapping from Preg scaling to KKT matrix.
Mapping from At scaling to KKT matrix.
Mapping from Gt scaling to KKT matrix.
Mapping from NT scaling to KKT matrix.
Mapping from NT scaling diagonal to KKT matrix.
Number of nonzeros in upper triangular portion of NT scaling.

briefdescription.para: Gets initial values for primal and dual variables such that (s,z) \in C.

memberdef.argsstring: (QOCOProblemData *data, QOCOVectorf *x_vec, QOCOVectorf *y_vec, QOCOVectorf *s_vec, QOCOVectorf *z_vec, QOCOVectorf *kktres_vec, QOCOFloat static_reg, QOCOVectorf *xyzbuff_vec, QOCOVectorf *nbuff_vec, QOCOVectorf *mbuff_vec)
memberdef.name: compute_kkt_residual

briefdescription.para: Computes residual of KKT conditions and stores in work->kkt->rhs.

detaileddescription.para: clang-format off [ P A^T G^T ] [ x ] [ c ] res = | A 0 0 | | y ] + | -b | [ G 0 0 ] [ z ] [ -h + s ]

clang-format on
data
Pointer to problem data
x_vec
Primal iterate.
y_vec
Dual iterate.
s_vec
Slack iterate.
z_vec
Dual iterate.
kktres_vec
Computed residual is stored here.
static_reg
Static regularization parameter.
xyzbuff_vec
Buffer of length n+p+m.
nbuff_vec
Buffer of length n.
mbuff_vec
Buffer of length m.

memberdef.argsstring: (QOCOProblemData *data, QOCOVectorf *x_vec, QOCOVectorf *nbuff_vec, QOCOFloat static_reg, QOCOFloat k)
memberdef.name: compute_objective

briefdescription.para: Constructs rhs for the affine scaling KKT system. Before calling this function, work->kkt->kktres must contain the residual of the KKT conditions as computed by compute_kkt_residual().
Constructs rhs for the combined direction KKT system. Before calling this function, work->kkt->kktres must contain the negative residual of the KKT conditions as computed by compute_kkt_residual().

inbodydescription.para: ds = -cone_product(lambda, lambda) - settings.mehrotra * cone_product((W' \ Dsaff), (W * Dzaff), pdata) + sigma * mu * e.

memberdef.argsstring: (QOCOFloat *x, QOCOFloat *y, QOCOProblemData *data, QOCOFloat *Wfull, QOCOInt *Wsoc_idx, QOCOInt *soc_idx, QOCOFloat *nbuff, QOCOFloat *mbuff1, QOCOFloat *mbuff2)
memberdef.name: kkt_multiply

briefdescription.para: Computes y = Kx where [ P A^T G^T ] K = | A 0 0 | [ G 0 -W'W - e * I ].

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to full NT scaling matrix W.
Vector pointing to the start of each SOC block in Wfull.
Array pointing to the start of each SOC block in x and y.
